document.title: Control Bus
document.summary: A dedicated channel for system management messages that control and monitor the integration platform.
document.implementation: SystemManagement.ControlBusPublisher publishes control messages to manage platform components.

document.title: Detour
document.summary: Routes messages through additional processing steps for debugging or testing, without modifying the original route.
document.implementation: Processing.Routing.Detour inserts a configurable detour into message routes, controllable via the Control Bus.

document.title: Wire Tap
document.summary: Inserts a simple recipient list that publishes each message to both the main channel and a monitoring channel.
document.implementation: OpenTelemetry distributed tracing and Observability module — every message is traced and logged without affecting flow.

document.title: Message History
document.summary: Appends processing history to each message so you can trace the path it took through the system.
document.implementation: Contracts.MessageHistoryHelper appends processing step records to IntegrationEnvelope headers.

document.title: Message Store
document.summary: Stores a copy of every message in a central location for auditing and replay.
document.implementation: SystemManagement.MessageStore persists messages to Cassandra for audit trails and replay.

document.title: Smart Proxy
document.summary: Tracks request-reply correlations and routes replies back to the original requester.
document.implementation: SystemManagement.SmartProxy maintains a correlation table and routes reply messages.

document.title: Test Message
document.summary: Generates test messages to verify the system is working end-to-end.
document.implementation: SystemManagement.TestMessageGenerator produces synthetic test messages for system verification.

document.title: Channel Purger
document.summary: Removes all messages from a channel to prepare for testing or reset state.
document.implementation: Ingestion.ChannelPurger clears messages from specified channels/topics.
